zh-CN.name: 字母V
zh-CN.intro: 字母V是英语字母表里的一个字母，它看起来像尖尖的小山，读作“微”。我们来认识它吧！

story.title: 🅥尖尖的胜利手势
story.body: 小熊维尼在纸上画了一个大大的V，说：“看，这是字母V，像不像两支铅笔碰在一起？”小蜜蜂飞过来说：“嗡嗡，V也像我的翅膀尖！”小兔子竖起耳朵说：“V还像胜利的手势，耶！”大家一起举起小手，比出V字，开心地喊：“V for Victory! V for Very happy!”字母V真神气，它总是站得直直的，尖尖的脑袋指向天空，好像永远在说：“我很棒！”

knowledge.title: 字母V的小知识
knowledge.body: 字母V是英语里的第22个字母，它是辅音字母。很多有趣的单词都以V开头，比如小提琴（violin）和火山（volcano）。

en.name: V
en.intro: Letter V is the 22nd letter of the alphabet. It looks like a sharp mountain and sounds like 'vee'. Let's get to know V!

story.title: 🅥Pointy Victory Sign
story.body: Winnie the Pooh drew a big V on the paper and said, 'Look, this is letter V. Doesn't it look like two pencils touching at the top?' A little bee buzzed over and said, 'Bzz, V also looks like the tips of my wings!' A bunny raised its ears and said, 'V is also like the victory sign, yay!' Everyone held up their hands to make a V and shouted happily, 'V for Victory! V for Very happy!' Letter V is so proud—it always stands up straight, its pointy head reaching toward the sky, as if saying, 'I'm great!'

knowledge.title: Fun Facts about Letter V
knowledge.body: V is the 22nd letter of the English alphabet and it is a consonant. Many fun words start with V, like violin and volcano.
